title: Form
description: A 123FormBuilder form including activation window, group assignment, and embed metadata.

id.description: Output-only numeric form identifier assigned by 123FormBuilder.

name.description: Human-readable form name shown to authors and used in dashboards.

active.description: Whether the form currently accepts submissions. 1 = active, 0 = inactive.

active_date_from.description: Start of the activation window. Submissions are rejected before this timestamp.

active_date_to.description: End of the activation window. Submissions are rejected after this timestamp.

active_days.description: Comma-separated list of weekday numbers (0-6) on which the form is accepting submissions.

group_id.description: Identifier of the group this form is filed under, or 0 if ungrouped.

submissions_count.description: Running total of submissions received by this form.

url.description: Public URL where the form can be filled out.

modified_at.description: Timestamp the form was last modified.
